name: SCC_ChargeParameterDiscoveryReqDC
title: SCC_ChargeParameterDiscoveryReqDC
syntax: void SCC_ChargeParameterDiscoveryReqDC ( byte SessionId[], double EVEnergyCapacity, double EVEnergyRequest)
description: The callback is called as soon as a Charge Parameter Discovery Request is received.
Further details that are transmitted in this request can be queried with the following functions:

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
